mva.explanation: MVA eigenvalue ratio λ_int/λ_min = 9.18. Reliable normal direction.

bz_status.label: Northward
bz_status.explanation: Bz = +1.6 nT — magnetopause closed. Minimal geomagnetic coupling.

axes.y: Particle energy [eV] — log scale, 20 keV (bottom) → 6 MeV/n (top)
axes.color: log₁₀ differential flux [p cm⁻² s⁻¹ sr⁻¹ eV⁻¹]

psd.interpretation: Spectral index α = -0.65. Kolmogorov MHD turbulence predicts −1.67. Shallower than −5/3 → energy injection (shock, CME).

explanations.beta: β = 1.020 — Thermally dominated. Kinetic effects important.
explanations.alfven: V_A = 39.3 km/s — Alfvén wave speed along field lines.
explanations.mach_a: M_A = 10.67 — flow/Alfvén speed. Super-Alfvénic — bow shock forms at Earth.
explanations.mach_s: M_s = 4021959487780.89 — flow/sound speed. Supersonic — shocks can form.
